content: Switch to proposal mode and generate all required artifacts for the change. Do not begin implementation.

All 5 artifacts created. Here's what's in `openspec/changes/campaign-session-access/`:

| Artifact | Summary |
|---|---|
| `proposal.md` | Why/what/scope — closes #442, two surfaces, no backend changes |
| `design.md` | 4 decisions: unconditional session section, action row button, layout name+tabs, pathname matching |
| `specs/campaign-dashboard-sessions/spec.md` | BDD scenarios for session section + action row button |
| `specs/campaign-subnav/spec.md` | BDD scenarios for tab bar, active tab per route, graceful degradation |
| `tasks.md` | 3 execution tasks (session section, button, layout) + full PR/merge/post-merge steps |
| `tests.md` | 10 test cases (TC-1.1–TC-3.10) mapped to specs and tasks |

Run `/opsx:apply` when ready to implement.
